testcase.name: struct 1
testcase.failure: org.scalatest.exceptions.TestFailedException: "...<stdlib.h> #include [<state.h> #include <stdio.h> #include <stdint.h> #include <stdbool.h> /**************** Snippet ****************/ int Snippet(int x0) { myStruct_t x1; return myStruct_getField](x1); } /***********..." did not equal "...<stdlib.h> #include ["state.h" #include <stdio.h> #include <stdint.h> #include <stdbool.h> /**************** Snippet ****************/ int Snippet(int x0) { state_t x1; set_state_pc(x1, 5); return state_epoch](x1); } /***********..." src/out/interpc_struct_1.check.c at testcase.name: interp 6
